name: Support - Dev Liaison Process
body:
[{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Support - Dev Liaison Process"}], "data-id": "support-dev-liaison-process"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following article outlines the process used to escalate tickets to development through the Dev Liaison Reporting process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this article:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#bugs", "children": [{"text": "Process: Bugs/Suspected Bugs"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#data-changes", "children": [{"text": "Process: Data Changes - Inventory scripts, POS rounding statements etc"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#pep", "children": [{"text": "Process: PEP - Product Enhancements and/or changes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#linking", "children": [{"text": "How to: Linking tickets"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please ensure all required fields (including the subject field) are completed.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"text": "Bugs/Suspected Bugs", "bold": true}], "data-id": "bugs-suspected-bugs"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For Bugs/Suspected Bugs please follow the below process:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a "}, {"text": "new ticket", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Core Problem: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Requires Investigation (New Ticket) ", "bold": true}, {"text": "macro"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "this will no-longer be the customer-facing ticket"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in all the fields", "bold": true}, {"text": " providing as much detail as possible, including examples where possible"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Submit", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The ticket will be assigned to Alan"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Link", "bold": true}, {"text": " the original customer ticket to the new ticket"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reply to the customer", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Put the "}, {"text": "original ticket on hold", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"text": "Data changes", "bold": true}], "data-id": "data-changes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For data changes like requesting inventory scripts, or POS rounding statements etc, please follow the below process:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a "}, {"text": "new ticket", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Core request: New Request (New Ticket)", "bold": true}, {"text": " macro"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in all the fields", "bold": true}, {"text": " providing as much detail as possible, including examples where possible"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For Inventory Scripts please include an example product with incorrect inventory so support/dev can review"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Submit ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the new ticket"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Link ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the original customer ticket to the new ticket"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reply to the customer", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Put the "}, {"text": "original ticket on hold", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"text": "PEP/Change Requests", "bold": true}], "data-id": "pep-change-requests"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For product enhancement or change requests, please follow the below process:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a "}, {"text": "new ticket", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Core PEP: New PEP (New Ticket)", "bold": true}, {"text": " macro"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in all the fields", "bold": true}, {"text": " providing as much detail as possible"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For PEP?s we need as much detail from the customers as possible including screenshots/mockups where applicable."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Submit", "bold": true}, {"text": " the ticket."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Link", "bold": true}, {"text": " the original customer ticket to the new ticket."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reply to the customer", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Solve the original ticket", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"text": "How to: Linking Tickets", "bold": true}], "data-id": "how-to-linking-tickets"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the new development ticket has been created make a note of the ticket number."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the customer facing ticket change the field "}, {"text": "Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " to ?Incident?."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A new field will then appear just under this field called "}, {"text": "Linked Problem", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiC3EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiC3EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage - 2023-07-10T023321.058.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "dev liaison ticket number", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "you should be prompted with the dev ticket; this can sometimes take a few minutes to populate"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
